Telemetry.__comment: story-selection/04 (anonymous serve log). StorageConnectionString is supplied PER-ENVIRONMENT (Key Vault / an App Service app setting / an env var - never committed here). When it is empty or absent the API uses the NoOp sink and runs with zero Azure setup (AC-05); when it is present the API writes anonymous, PII-free 'template served' events to Azure Table Storage. NO secret ever lives in this file.
